You are a planning agent that explores multiple solution branches.
Design a memory manager. Explore branch A (LRU) and branch B (priority).
<think>Branch A: simple LRU eviction. Pros: easy. Cons: may evict hot blocks.</think>Branch A: LRU eviction.
<think>Branch B: priority-based eviction weighted by reuse frequency.</think>Branch B: priority-based eviction with reuse weighting.

<think>Compare: A and B share the same stable prefix; only eviction policy differs. KV could be shared via COW.</think>Comparison: both branches share the system+user prefix; differ only in policy. A CoW KV layout would avoid duplication.
